items.risk: Visible container metrics must be read after layout mount.
items.mitigation: Use containerRef.getBoundingClientRect and fallback arrangement only when rect is unavailable.

items.risk: React Mosaic tree does not have explicit empty logical slots.
items.mitigation: Represent logical grid with bandCounts and keep visible tile count equal to tab count.

items.risk: Seven and eight tab layouts can regress to four-by-two style compression.
items.mitigation: Lock 3x3 logical baseline with unit tests and E2E visible tile count checks.
